scripts.build: cargo build --workspace && npm --prefix packages/ulgen-desktop run build
scripts.lint: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && npm --prefix packages/ulgen-desktop run typecheck
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test: cargo test --workspace && npm --prefix packages/ulgen-desktop run test
